name: autoresearch
description: Autonomous research engine for Claude Code — iteratively prototype and improve with pluggable evaluation (LLM judge, metric comparison, test suite, hybrid). Inspired by Karpathy's autoresearch.

plugins.name: autoresearch
plugins.description: Autonomous experimentation loop with pluggable judges. /autoresearch runs the loop. Supports LLM pairwise comparison, numeric metrics, test suites, and hybrid evaluation.
